rationale: Section 31.06 governs acceptable mediums of tax payment (currency, checks, credit cards, electronic transfers). It is unrelated to homestead exemption amounts under §11.13(b); no conflict arises from increasing the exemption.
quote: a collector shall accept United States currency or a check or money order in payment of taxes and shall accept payment by credit card or electronic funds transfer.
_note: No conflict. §31.06 addresses payment methods, not exemption levels.
